TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: Bruce Bowen raral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA, wal malaxmisuq qaniy la. kawas tay 1971, ryax sa tay 14 nqu tay 6, Bruce Bowen, squliq na p'unro. qnxan nya Bruce Bowen htagan beh sa Merced,California. maki sazing mlikuy laqi. kinblayqan pincyuwagan sa qnxan niya' pspngan mari sa may yugal yacing masuq mspung mari sa pspngan mari na maycyugal byacing lga cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players
S.PHON: βruʦ~ʨe βowen raral ħjaʔɣa s~ɕis~ɕjuw na nβa, wal malaxmis~ɕuq qanij la. kawas~ɕ taj ****, rjax s~ɕa taj ** nqu taj *, βruʦ~ʨe βowen, s~ɕquliq na pʔunro. qnxan nja βruʦ~ʨe βowen ħtaɣan βeħ s~ɕa merʦ~ʨe*,ʦ~ʨali*ornia. maki s~ɕaziŋ mlikuj laqi. kinβlajqan pinʦ~ʨjuwaɣan s~ɕa qnxan nijaʔ ps~ɕpŋan mari s~ɕa maj juɣal jaʦ~ʨiŋ mas~ɕuq ms~ɕpuŋ mari s~ɕa ps~ɕpŋan mari na majʦ~ʨjuɣal βjaʦ~ʨiŋ lɣa ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ lis~ɕts~ɕ o* national βas~ɕketβall as~ɕs~ɕoʦ~ʨiation plajers~ɕ
S.FORM: Bruce Bowen raral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA, wal malaxmisuq qaniy la. kawas tay 1971, ryax sa tay 14 nqu tay 6, Bruce Bowen, squliq na p'unro. qnxan nya Bruce Bowen htagan beh sa Merced,California. maki sazing mlikuy laqi. kinblayqan pincyuwagan sa qnxan niya' pspngan mari sa may yugal yacing masuq mspung mari sa pspngan mari na maycyugal byacing lga cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players
S.PHON: βruʦ~ʨe βowen raral ħjaʔɣa s~ɕis~ɕjuw na nβa, wal malaxmis~ɕuq qanij la. kawas~ɕ taj ****, rjax s~ɕa taj ** nqu taj *, βruʦ~ʨe βowen, s~ɕquliq na pʔunro. qnxan nja βruʦ~ʨe βowen ħtaɣan βeħ s~ɕa merʦ~ʨe*,ʦ~ʨali*ornia. maki s~ɕaziŋ mlikuj laqi. kinβlajqan pinʦ~ʨjuwaɣan s~ɕa qnxan nijaʔ ps~ɕpŋan mari s~ɕa maj juɣal jaʦ~ʨiŋ mas~ɕuq ms~ɕpuŋ mari s~ɕa ps~ɕpŋan mari na majʦ~ʨjuɣal βjaʦ~ʨiŋ lɣa ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ lis~ɕts~ɕ o* national βas~ɕketβall as~ɕs~ɕoʦ~ʨiation plajers~ɕ
